_security_warning: Copy to config/bridge-search.config.json or set BRIDGE_SEARCH_CONFIG. Keys starting with _ are ignored.
_profile: Windows full-text search via AnyTXT HTTP only. No Everything (es.exe), no WSL find/grep. Filename lookup on Windows is unavailable—use locate_content_inside_files with target_env "windows" for indexed content; use WSL paths + enable backends if you need find/grep.
_write_note: manage_file(write) replaces by default. Append requires write_mode='append' on the tool call; there is no config-level append default.
